calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2003 Continued To Oct-07-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Maria Torreano.
Appearances:
Ronald Wecht, Esq. for Petitioner Sheldon Blair, the guardian ad litem and Ethan Blair, a minor also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Reimbursement for costs to: Walkup, Melodia, Kelly,m Wecht & Schoenberger of $3,250.89.
Attorney's fees: $14,512.37.
Balance of $10,2236.74 of which $80,000.00 going to purchase an annuity that will provide future payments from Aug. 24,2019 to Aug. 24,2029 and $2,236.74 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 10 Chestnut Ave., San Francisco until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2003 Continued To Aug-19-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 8/19/2003 at 10:00 a.m., in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)
